siteSettings.title: Diya Vashi — Full-Stack Developer
siteSettings.description: Full-Stack Developer specializing in Angular, ASP.NET Core, Node.js and MySQL. MCA student at SRIMCA Bardoli. Research published at ISTE and Springer.

heroContent.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer
heroContent.impactStatement: Building scalable web systems with Angular, ASP.NET Core & Node.js — from production HRMS platforms to research-published healthcare applications.

blueprintText: My engineering approach is rooted in building resilient, scalable, and highly optimized architectures. I specialize in the ASP.NET Core and Angular ecosystems, developing enterprise-grade backend systems and dynamic user interfaces that solve complex business challenges with clean, maintainable code.

I believe that great software is the intersection of rigorous logic and creative problem-solving. Whether it's architecting a robust backend, designing a seamless database schema, or integrating cloud infrastructure, my focus is always on delivering performance-driven applications that scale effortlessly.
researchText: Beyond traditional software engineering, I am deeply passionate about Artificial Intelligence and its real-world applications in healthcare. My academic research focuses on deep learning architectures for medical image analysis, bridging the gap between cutting-edge AI and clinical diagnostics.

I have successfully published research on advanced skin disease detection utilizing customized deep learning frameworks like MobileNetV2 and DenseNet201. My work, recognized in Springer publications and presented at international conferences, reflects my commitment to utilizing technology for impactful innovations.

bullets: Developed full-stack HRMS & Project Management platform with attendance, recruitment, expense tracking, and task management modules
Built secure REST APIs with JWT authentication and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for multi-user access management
Implemented real-time notifications, productivity tracking, and dynamic dashboards using Socket.IO and Angular
Designed reporting features with Excel/PDF export and automated workflows to improve operational efficiency

projectsContent.title: BookMyDoc
projectsContent.subtitle: Clinic & Appointment Management App
bullets: Designed and developed a mobile application for clinic management and doctor appointment scheduling
Implemented user authentication with Firebase Auth and real-time database using Firestore
Created adaptive rescheduling algorithm for rural and urban clinic efficiency
Integrated appointment booking, doctor profiles, and clinic management features

projectsContent.title: JourneyJournals
projectsContent.subtitle: Travel Diary Web Application
bullets: Built a travel diary web application for users to document and share their travel experiences
Implemented CRUD operations for blog posts with image uploads and rich text editing
Designed responsive UI using ASP.NET Core MVC with Bootstrap
Integrated user authentication and profile management features

publicationsContent.title: Research Paper: Enhancing Doctor Appointment Systems with Adaptive Rescheduling for Rural and Urban Clinics: BookMyDoc
publicationsContent.conference: Journal of Emerging Technologies and Innovative Research (JETIR)
